_comment: Full sweep for Task 2D.11 (vorticity-augmented FH ansatz, axisymmetric A_phi). 6 FH params scanned over the Session-11 strict-pass region; 4 vortical params scanned to probe whether vortical augmentation recovers an extended passenger zone. Estimated ~10 800 raw points (3x3x3x3x3x3 FH x 5x3x3x3 vortical = ~10920) at Npts=65; per-point cost ~0.7 s on cpu-xl gives ~70 min ~= $1.5-$3.0. Budget cap: $3. Headline metric: max(passenger_zone_radius) across the grid for strict-pass (wec_pass_fraction == 1 AND dec_pass_fraction == 1) points -- if it scales as h instead of >> h, the all-wall-no-interior pathology is robust to vortical augmentation in the axisymmetric A family.
